typecheck.summary: TypeScript compilation passed with no errors

blockingIssues.description: Non-streaming error handling bug at line 355: condition `if (code !== 0 && !stdout)` silently ignores errors when cursor-agent exits non-zero but produces partial stdout. A non-zero exit code typically indicates an error even if some output was produced.
Handoff metadata references commitId 'edb0ba8' which does not exist in the repository (actual commit is '07eb9c6'). This is a tracking discrepancy.

Expected behavior states 'Token is sent in Authorization header' but implementation delegates auth to cursor-agent internally (cursor-agent reads ~/.cursor/auth.json or cli-config.json directly). Documentation/implementation mismatch.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add clarification on authentication architecture: the proxy delegates auth to cursor-agent internally rather than extracting tokens for Authorization headers. This affects expected behavior documentation for features.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: auth-flow-cursor-agent feature expectedBehavior contradicts actual implementation

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the cursor-agent --trust flag requirement for non-interactive workspace access
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: chat-completions-streaming worker discovered this runtime behavior; not documented in environment.md

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify PORT environment variable usage: services.yaml shows 'bun run proxy' but workers used 'PORT=32124 bun run proxy'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: chat-completions-streaming transcript shows PORT=32124 prefix, not documented in services.yaml

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: The 'worker' skill is referenced by many features but doesn't exist. Either create the skill or update features to reference an existing skill.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: features.json references skillName: 'worker' but .factory/skills/ directory has no 'worker' skill

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document what lint should check and which tool to use. Currently 'bun lint' is referenced but not documented in AGENTS.md testing commands section.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: AGENTS.md uses 'bun lint' but doesn't specify implementation; worker had to determine tsc --noEmit was the appropriate command

rejectedObservations.observation: AGENTS.md says project should be 'CliCursorProxyAPI' but local directory is 'opencode-cursor'
rejectedObservations.reason: This is a documentation inconsistency in AGENTS.md, not a worker error. The feature description did not include renaming the local directory, so worker correctly left it unchanged.

rejectedObservations.observation: services.yaml typecheck command not in git diff for fix-typescript-errors
rejectedObservations.reason: services.yaml already has typecheck command defined (currently shows 'typecheck: bun run typecheck'). The discrepancy in the review observation appears to be about timing of when services.yaml was modified, not a missing entry.
